name: Daily Trading Setup Workflow
description: Automated workflow for generating daily trading setups. Includes market structure analysis, key level identification, and trade setup scanning across multiple instruments.

config.prompt: Analyze the current market structure for the given instrument(s). Identify: current trend direction, key swing highs/lows, liquidity pools, and market structure shifts. Return JSON with: trend (up/down/range), swingPoints (array), liquidityPools (array), mss (boolean), structureSummary (string).

Identify key supply and demand zones, order blocks, and fair value gaps for the instrument(s). Assess zone strength and freshness. Return JSON with: supplyZones (array), demandZones (array), orderBlocks (array), fvgs (array), highProbabilityLevels (array).

Based on market structure and key levels, identify valid trade setups. For each setup include: entry zone, stop loss, take profit, risk/reward ratio, confidence level, and setup type (trend continuation/reversal/range). Return JSON with: setups (array), recommendedSetup (object), overallBias (bullish/bearish/neutral).
